LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITION TO CORRECT DENIED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED. RESPONDENT'S REQUEST FOR FEES IS DENIED. PETITIONER'S CLAIM FOR FEES AS A PREVAILING PARTY UNDER THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT WAS PRESENTED TO THE ARBITRATOR AND DENIED BY HIM ON THE MERITS. THE ARBITRATOR DID NOT DESIGNATE PETITIONER AS A PREVAILING PARTY UNDER THE AGREEMENT, AND REJECTED EITHER, OR BOTH, OF PLAINTIFF'S INTERPRETATION OF THE AGREEMENT, AND OF THE FACTS. MR. ROCKWELL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Deborah Koons Garcia'S Petition To Correct Arbitration Award (Ccp 1286.6); Appendix To Exhibits To Declaration Of Jonathan R. Bass In Support Of Deborah Koons Garcia'S Petition To Correct Arbitration Award (Volumes 1 Through 5)
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER DEBORAH GARCIA'S PETITION TO CORRECT ARBITRATION AWARD (CCP 1286.6)

Appearances:
Jonathan Bass of Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass (391.4800) for petitioner and moving party
Lawrence Rockwell and Eric Handler of Donahue Gallagher Woods (510.451.0544) for respondents and opposing parties Annebelle Garcia-McLean, Clifford Garcia, Heather Garcia Katz, Sunshine May Walker Kesey, and Theresa Adams Garcia
Keith Kandarian of Tobin & Tobin (772.9620) for respondent Jerry Garcia Estate LLC

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition to correct denied. The Arbitration Award is confirmed. Respondent's request for fees is denied. Petitioner's claim for fees as a prevailing party under the parties' agreement was presented to the Arbitrator and denied by him on the merits. The Arbitrator did not designate Petitioner as a prevailing party under the Agreement, and rejected either, or both, of plaintiff's interpretation of the Agreement, and of the facts. Mr. Rockwell to submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB/ER) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189
